message:
🐛 Fix unit-test and security-e2e-test nightly failures (#2059)

* ✨ Expand nightly test coverage from 25 to 32 suites

Add 7 new test suites to the nightly runner:
- unit-test: vitest unit tests (98 existing test files)
- card-registry-integrity-test: card registry validation (already existed, now wired in)
- a11y-test: WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility compliance
- error-resilience-test: API failure/timeout graceful degradation
- i18n-test: internationalization compliance
- interaction-test: UI interaction responsiveness
- security-e2e-test: runtime security compliance (XSS, CSP, etc.)

All 5 new Playwright compliance specs get CI-aware timeouts
(2x multiplier when process.env.CI is set) to prevent false
failures on slower GitHub Actions runners.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix unit-test and security-e2e-test failures in nightly

- security-compliance.spec.ts: Replace hardcoded localhost:5174 with
  PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL env var so auth bypass check uses the correct
  port (4174) when running under the nightly shared preview server
- vite.config.ts: Add CI-aware teardownTimeout and pool terminateTimeout
  (60s vs 10s) to prevent "Timeout terminating forks worker" error on
  slow GitHub Actions runners

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -196,6 +196,13 @@ manualChunks: (id) => {
     css: true,
     include: ['src/**/*.{test,spec}.{ts,tsx}'],
     exclude: ['node_modules', 'e2e/**/*'],
+    teardownTimeout: process.env.CI ? 60_000 : 10_000, // CI runners need more time to terminate workers
+    poolOptions: {
+      forks: {
+        // Prevent "Timeout terminating forks worker" on slow CI runners
+        terminateTimeout: process.env.CI ? 60_000 : 10_000,
+      },
+    },
     coverage: {
       provider: 'v8',
       reporter: ['text', 'json', 'html'],
